prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7538→8298→8560→4785→4516，2024年位次大幅前移（从8560跃升至4785），2025年进一步前移至4516，近两年累计前移约4044名， 显示该校在湖南物理类考生中热度显著上升；2021–2025年物理类计划数分别为138→121→117→89→73，呈持续缩减趋势；2026年计划仅38人，较2025年大幅 缩招约48%，缩招幅度显著，按供需弹性原理将降低录取门槛（位次数字减小），但需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学主榜排名第28位（2026年），近年排名稳定在28–32位区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信 号；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度有所升温但非顶尖热度；历史投档异常记录对报考心理有滞后影响；化学工程与技 术A+（全国顶尖），力学A、机械工程A、土木工程A、工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A，控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-，共10个A-及以上学科，工科实力雄厚， 对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科高度契合；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7 万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批405分，近年呈小幅波动下降趋势；该校位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校；在湖南 省招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属跨省招生，无本省偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次连续前移趋势、2026年计划大幅缩招（降低门槛）、湖南省物理类考 生增加（加剧竞争）以及声誉偏负面信号，但考生增加与声誉偏负面形成向上修正压力；预测2026年物理类最低位次约3247 名，区间2784–3710名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类仅设6个高起点专业（均为创新班/拔尖班/大师班），整体录取门槛较高。位次在预测区间低位（约2784名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约30 00–3500名）以二档为主；位次在区间高位（约3500名以上）需谨慎评估，因三档可选专业极少。建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估优势（化工A+、机械A、计算机A等）综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7538 → 8298 → 8560 → 4785 → 4516. In 2024, the ranking significantly advanced (from 8560 to 4785), and further advanced to 4516 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 4044 positions over the past two years, indicating a notable increase in popularity among Hunan Physics Category examinees. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 138 → 121 → 117 → 89 → 73, showing a continuous decreasing trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is only 38, a substantial reduction of about 48% compared to 2025. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, this will lower the admission threshold (decrease in ranking number), but other factors need to be considered comprehensively.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering strong schools. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission gaps or abnormal cutoff lines. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, indicating a warming but not top-tier attention for applications. Historical admission anomalies have a lagging effect on application psychology. Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in China), Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with a total of 10 A- or above disciplines, demonstrating strong engineering strength and strong appeal to high-scoring examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are consistently highly recommended in society, highly aligned with the university's strong engineering fields. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 405 points, showing a slight fluctuating downward trend in recent years. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local university. The enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is about 2.5% (2024 data), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous ranking advancement trend in 2024–2025, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (lowering the threshold), the increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), and the negative reputation signals, but the increase in examinees and negative reputation form upward correction pressure. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 3247, with a range of 2784–3710.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Excellence Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (New Engineering Top Talent Class)
- Mathematics (Hua Luogeng Mathematics National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other low-score majors available (in 2026, Physics Category has only 6 enrollment majors, all with high graduate school recommendation rates/Innovation Classes/Top Talent Classes, overall threshold is high).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category has only 6 high-starting-point majors (all Innovation Classes/Top Talent Classes/Master Classes), with a high overall admission threshold. Candidates with rankings in the lower end of the predicted range (approximately within 2784) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 3000–3500) should mainly target Tier 2; those with rankings in the upper end of the range (approximately above 3500) need to carefully evaluate, as there are very few Tier 3 optional majors. It is recommended to combine personal interests with the university's discipline evaluation strengths (Chemical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Computer Science A, etc.) for comprehensive selection.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次约1953→2085→2454→2236→2560，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年累计后移约607名；2025年基准位次约2560名；2021–2 025年历史类计划数分别为18→15→19→23→23，近年小幅扩招后稳定在23人；2026年计划仍为23人，与2025年持平，无计划变动对竞争的直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程 、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名第28位（2026年），属国内顶尖高校，但以理工科见长，历史类学科相对非强势方向；2026年高考周期声 誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第55位（较热），整体曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常记录可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；该校优势学科集中于工科（化工A+、机械A、计算机A等），历史类招生专业（英语、日语、新闻传播学类、公共事业管理、哲学类、建筑类）无直接对应的A类学科支撑，学 科吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学类社会热度明显劝退（张雪峰效应持续），外语类专业热度一般观望；湖南省2026年历史类考生约18.7万人，较2025年14 .25万人增加约31.2%，竞争显著加剧；省控线2025年历史类本科批446分，近年呈波动上升趋势；该校位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校；在湖南省历史类招生人 数较少（约23人），属跨省招生，无本省偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划持平、湖南省历史类考生大幅增加（+31.2%）以及声誉偏负面信号，但考生大幅增加与声誉偏负面形成向上修正压力；预测2026年历史类最低位次约2610名，区间2218–3002名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated from approximately 1953 to 2085 to 2454 to 2236 to 2560, showing an overall trend of moving backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 607 places in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2560; the planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 18, 15, 19, 23, and 23 respectively, with a slight expansion in recent years stabilizing at 23; the 2026 plan remains at 23, unchanged from 2025, with no direct impact from plan changes on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (2026), belonging to top domestic universities, but known for science and engineering, with History Category disciplines being relatively less strong; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal signals of admission cutoffs or score lines; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot), with overall exposure at a medium-high level; historical abnormal admission records may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; the university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Chemical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Computer Science A, etc.), while the History Category enrollment majors (English, Japanese, Journalism and Communication, Public Administration, Philosophy, Architecture) lack direct support from A-class disciplines, making disciplinary appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors is clearly discouraged (the Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), while foreign language majors are generally met with lukewarm interest; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,500 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 446 points, showing a fluctuating upward trend in recent years; the university is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local university; the number of History Category enrollments in Hunan Province is relatively small (about 23), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking backward, the unchanged 2026 plan, the significant increase in History Category examinees in Hunan Province (+31.2%), and the negative reputation signals, but the large increase in examinees and negative reputation create upward correction pressure; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2610, with a range of 2218 to 3002.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Architecture (including Industrial Design)
- Public Administration (including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- English (including Translation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Japanese.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the History Category enrollment majors are mainly humanities, social sciences, and languages, with weak disciplinary evaluation support, and the social popularity of Journalism, Communication, and foreign language majors is low. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the predicted range (approximately within 2218) can aim for Tier 1 Architecture or Public Administration; those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 2400–2800) should focus on Tier 2; those with rankings at the higher end of the range (approximately above 2800) can consider Tier 3 Philosophy or Japanese as a safety option. It is recommended to weigh personal interests and employment prospects comprehensively.
